name: Yellow Duston
desc: Cannot be used as a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Material for a Summon. While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot be Tributed. When this card on the field is destroyed: The controller targets 1 monster in their Graveyard; shuffle that target into the Deck. You can only control 1 face-up "Yellow Duston".
mnst_eff: Cannot be used as a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Material for a Summon. While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot be Tributed. When this card on the field is destroyed: The controller targets 1 monster in their Graveyard; shuffle that target into the Deck. You can only control 1 face-up "Yellow Duston".
eff: Cannot be used as a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Material for a Summon. While this card is face-up on the field, it cannot be Tributed. When this card on the field is destroyed: The controller targets 1 monster in their Graveyard; shuffle that target into the Deck. You can only control 1 face-up "Yellow Duston".

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
summoning: Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
